### Title

Distribution of Entropy Across Page Excerpts

### Purpose of the Figure

This figure shows GPT-4o's entropy levels after performing OCR on many page excerpts. Approximately 0.25 bits/token is the most common value observed.

### Generated By

[entropy_vs_cer.py](../../scripts/entropy_vs_cer.py)

### Input Files Used

[results_k_10.csv](../../results/csv/results_k_10.csv)

### Output Filenames

PNG: [figure_02_entropy_distribution.png](../../results/figures/figure_02_entropy_distribution.png)

SVG: [figure_02_entropy_distribution.svg](../../results/figures/figure_02_entropy_distribution.svg)

### X-axis

Average Token Entropy (Bits/Token)

### Y-axis

Frequency

### Units

Average Token Entropy: Bits/Token

Frequency: Scalar value

### Other Information

- Filtering rules: samples with a CER > 2% were filtered from the dataset.

- Normalization choices: whitespace was normalized, punctuation was removed entirely, and all characters were converted to lowercase for both ground-truth and OCR texts.

- Sample size: the plot illustrates the distribution of entropy across 100 randomly selected page excerpts.

### Figure Importance

This plot helps visualize uncertainty in GPT-4o's OCR output by showing how entropy values are distributed.
